patternTypes.name: page
patternTypes.definition: Reusable page-level composition, sequencing, or journey pattern.

patternTypes.name: section
patternTypes.definition: Reusable section-level structure such as hero, FAQ, proof, comparison, or CTA.

patternTypes.name: component
patternTypes.definition: Reusable component anatomy, state, or behavior pattern.

patternTypes.name: interaction
patternTypes.definition: Reusable interaction, disclosure, feedback, navigation, or state transition pattern.

patternTypes.name: storytelling
patternTypes.definition: Reusable narrative, proof, objection, or decision-flow pattern.

patternTypes.name: conversion
patternTypes.definition: Reusable structure that supports a conversion goal without copying a specific page.

patternTypes.name: accessibility
patternTypes.definition: Reusable accessibility constraint or inclusive interaction pattern.

patternTypes.name: responsive
patternTypes.definition: Reusable breakpoint, priority, or responsive behavior pattern.

patternTypes.name: seo
patternTypes.definition: Reusable search-facing metadata, summary, or content-structure pattern.
